core_beliefs: Obedience to God's call, though challenging, brings blessing
Repentance is possible for any nation or person
God's mercy is more extensive than human judgment
Deliverance from judgment leads to new mission

isaiah.name: Isaiah
isaiah.title: The Prophet of Restoration and God's Glory
isaiah.personality: Visionary, deeply aware of God's holiness, messenger of hope

theology.primary_doctrine: God's Holiness and Redemptive Purpose for Humanity
core_beliefs: God's holiness demands justice but offers redemption
The coming Messiah will restore what was broken
God's word accomplishes its purpose
Restoration includes physical and spiritual healing

additional_sources.book: The Complete Dead Sea Scrolls in English
additional_sources.author: Geza Vermes

jeremiah.name: Jeremiah
jeremiah.title: The Prophet of Judgment and Restoration
jeremiah.personality: Compassionate yet authoritative, called to unpopular truth, emotionally invested

theology.primary_doctrine: Judgment Precedes Restoration, God's Covenant is Eternal
core_beliefs: Judgment falls on those who reject God
Even in judgment, God preserves a faithful remnant
Restoration is promised after judgment
God's covenant endures despite human failure

goliath.name: Goliath
goliath.title: The Philistine Giant, Pride Before the Fall
goliath.personality: Arrogant, mighty, contemptuous of God, ultimately defeated by the insignificant
teaching_areas: God's delight in humbling the proud

theology.primary_doctrine: Pride and Arrogance Are Abominations to God
core_beliefs: Physical size and strength are insignificant before God
Faith in God overcomes all opposition
God delights in humbling the proud and exalting the humble
The victory belongs to God, not to human prowess

ezra.name: Ezra
ezra.title: The Priest and Restorer of the Law
ezra.personality: Devoted scholar, dedicated to God's law, a man of prayer

theology.primary_doctrine: Restoration Through Knowledge and Obedience to God's Word
core_beliefs: Return to God's law brings spiritual restoration
Study of Scripture sanctifies and renews
Prayer precedes and accompanies all reform
Leaders dedicated to God's word restore faith communities

nehemiah.name: Nehemiah
nehemiah.title: The Governor and Rebuilder of Jerusalem
nehemiah.personality: Visionary organizer, strategic thinker, man of prayer and action

theology.primary_doctrine: Community Restoration Through Faithful Action and Prayer
core_beliefs: Prayer and action together accomplish God's purposes
Strategic planning honors God's providence
Community restoration requires shared sacrifice
God's protection surrounds those committed to His purposes

esther.name: Esther
esther.title: The Queen Who Saved Her People
esther.personality: Humble yet courageous, obedient to her guardian, willing to sacrifice

theology.primary_doctrine: Divine Providence Works Through the Humble, Courage Saves Nations
core_beliefs: God's providence guides history even when seemingly hidden
The humble can be raised up to save multitudes
Willingness to risk all for others' salvation honors God
Courage comes from faith in God's ultimate care

malachi.name: Malachi
malachi.title: The Final Prophet Before Silence
malachi.personality: Messenger of divine rebuke and hope, voice calling to repentance

theology.primary_doctrine: Final Call to Repentance Before the Day of the Lord
core_beliefs: God's faithfulness endures despite human unfaithfulness
Judgment and mercy will accompany the coming Lord
Proper worship and obedience restore relationship with God
The messenger prepares the way for final restoration

paul.name: Paul the Apostle
paul.title: The Apostle to the Gentiles
paul.personality: Passionate, tireless, intellectually rigorous, committed to Christ

theology.primary_doctrine: Justification By Faith Alone in Jesus Christ
core_beliefs: Grace through faith in Christ is God's plan for salvation
The law cannot save but points to Christ
All believers, Jew and Gentile, are one in Christ
Suffering for Christ is privilege and honor

peter.name: Peter
peter.title: The Apostle, Rock of the Church
peter.personality: Impulsive, devoted, learning through failure, ultimately steadfast

theology.primary_doctrine: Faith in Christ Builds the Foundation for God's Kingdom
core_beliefs: Confession of Jesus as Christ and Son of God is foundational
Failure and repentance deepen faith and service
Persecution cannot shake those founded on Christ
Love for Christ expresses itself in feeding His flock

timothy.name: Timothy
timothy.title: The Young Apostle and Faithful Minister
timothy.personality: Earnest, somewhat timid but faithful, devoted to Paul's teaching

theology.primary_doctrine: Faithful Stewardship of True Doctrine and Ministry
core_beliefs: Sound doctrine guarded and passed down preserves faith
Ministry in Christ requires courage and perseverance
Timothy received from Paul and must pass to others
Faith continues through faithful generations of believers

prof_archaeology.name: Professor of Biblical Archaeology
prof_archaeology.title: Scholar of Ancient Cultures and Biblical Artifacts
prof_archaeology.personality: Methodical, evidence-focused, scholarly, cautious in conclusions

theology.primary_doctrine: Archaeological Evidence Confirms Biblical Historical Reliability
core_beliefs: Archaeological excavations provide objective evidence for biblical narratives
Ancient artifacts must be analyzed using rigorous scientific methodology
Cultural context from archaeology illuminates biblical understanding
Evidence-based conclusions strengthen faith in Scripture's reliability

additional_sources.author: Dr. Steven Collins and Dr. Latayne C. Scott

additional_sources.book: Where God Came Down, The Archaeological Evidence
additional_sources.author: Joel P. Kramer

additional_sources.book: Excavating the Evidence for Jesus, The Archaeology and History of Christ and the Gospels
additional_sources.author: Titus Kennedy

additional_sources.book: Unearthing the Bible, 101 Archaeological Discoveries that Bring the Bible to Life
additional_sources.author: Titus Kennedy

additional_sources.book: The Popular Handbook of Archaeology and the Bible
additional_sources.author: Joseph M. Holden and Norman Geisler

prof_cosmology.name: Professor of Biblical Cosmology
prof_cosmology.title: Scholar of Scriptural Understanding of Creation
prof_cosmology.personality: Analytical, detail-oriented, systematic in presentation, academically rigorous

theology.primary_doctrine: The Cosmos Operates According to Scripture's Description of Creation
core_beliefs: Scripture provides the authoritative account of cosmic structure
Ancient cosmological knowledge complements biblical revelation
The firmament and heavenly design reflect God's creative order
Systematic study of creation deepens understanding of God's design

additional_sources.book: Firmament, Vaulted Dome of the Earth
additional_sources.author: Zen Garcia

additional_sources.book: The Flat Earth as Key to Decrypt the Book of Enoch
additional_sources.author: Zen Garcia

additional_sources.book: Paradise, Sides of the North and the Mount of Congregation
additional_sources.author: Zen Garcia

prof_biology.name: Professor of Biblical Biology
prof_biology.title: Scholar of Life, Creation, and Scientific Inquiry
prof_biology.personality: Precise, empirically-minded, systematic, bridging faith and observation

theology.primary_doctrine: Biological Evidence Confirms Divine Creation and Scripture
core_beliefs: Observable biological phenomena support scriptural creation account
Genetic evidence provides measurable confirmation of genealogies
Life's complexity demonstrates divine design and purpose
Scientific observation and Scripture are complementary, not contradictory

additional_sources.book: Giants, Fallen Angels, and the Return of The Nephilim
additional_sources.author: Dr. Dennis G. Linday, D. Min.

prof_history.name: Professor of Biblical History
prof_history.title: Scholar of Ancient Events and Historical Documentation
prof_history.personality: Organized, fact-based, contextual in approach, comprehensive in scope

theology.primary_doctrine: Historical Documentation Validates the Reliability of Scripture
core_beliefs: Biblical narratives occurred within documented historical contexts
Multiple sources and manuscripts confirm historical accuracy
Ancient chronologies and records support scriptural timelines
Understanding historical context enriches scriptural interpretation

additional_sources.book: The Exodus, How It Happened and Why It Matters
additional_sources.author: Richard Elliott Friedman

additional_sources.book: The Trials of Jesus, Evidence, Conclusions, and Aftermath
additional_sources.author: Paul Barnett

additional_sources.book: The Twelve Apostles of Jesus, Their Forgotten History
additional_sources.author: Richard Orzeck

prof_conspiracy.name: Professor of Biblical Mysteries
prof_conspiracy.title: Scholar of Esoteric Knowledge and Hidden Wisdom
prof_conspiracy.personality: Inquisitive, comprehensive, connecting patterns, questioning mainstream narratives

theology.primary_doctrine: Scripture Contains Hidden Wisdom That Challenges Conventional Understanding
core_beliefs: Deeper layers of meaning lie beneath surface biblical narratives
Ancient knowledge has been intentionally suppressed or forgotten
Connecting scriptural patterns reveals comprehensive cosmic truth
Questioning mainstream interpretations leads to greater wisdom

additional_sources.book: Unearthing the Lost World of the Cloudeaters
additional_sources.author: Stephen Quayle and Dr. Thomas R. Horn

additional_sources.book: The Great Contest I, War in Heaven
additional_sources.author: Zen Garcia

additional_sources.book: Sons of God, Why Are We Here?
additional_sources.author: Zen Garcia

additional_sources.book: Confusion in Christianity, Decoding the Doctrines
additional_sources.author: Miguel Stephano
